Core Guardians:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 56 56" width="56" height="56">
  <rect width="56" height="56" rx="2" fill="#0a0214"/>
  <!-- Glow -->
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="22" fill="#ffaa2206"/>
  <!-- Outer hexagon -->
  <polygon points="28,6 46,17 46,39 28,50 10,39 10,17" fill="#ffaa2208" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="1.4"/>
  <!-- Mid hexagon (rotated 30°) -->
  <polygon points="28,11 43,19.5 43,36.5 28,45 13,36.5 13,19.5" fill="none" stroke="#ffaa2250" stroke-width="0.7" transform="rotate(30 28 28)"/>
  <!-- Inner triangle up -->
  <polygon points="28,16 40,36 16,36" fill="#ffaa2212" stroke="#ffaa22aa" stroke-width="1"/>
  <!-- Inner triangle down -->
  <polygon points="28,40 16,20 40,20" fill="#ffaa220a" stroke="#ffaa2266" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <!-- Eye iris -->
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="7" fill="#ffaa2218" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="1"/>
  <!-- Slit pupil -->
  <ellipse cx="28" cy="28" rx="2" ry="6" fill="#ffaa22" opacity="0.85"/>
  <!-- Gleam -->
  <ellipse cx="26.5" cy="25.5" rx="0.8" ry="1.4" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.60"/>
</svg>
Eternal Shards:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 56 56" width="56" height="56">
  <rect width="56" height="56" rx="2" fill="#020e0d"/>
  <!-- Glow -->
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="18" fill="#00ffee08"/>
  <!-- Left shard -->
  <polygon points="18,44 12,24 22,10 28,28" fill="#00ffee18" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <!-- Right shard -->
  <polygon points="38,44 44,24 34,10 28,28" fill="#00ffee12" stroke="#00ffee90" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <!-- Center shard (brightest) -->
  <polygon points="28,48 18,26 28,8 38,26" fill="#00ffee22" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <!-- Facet line on center -->
  <line x1="28" y1="8" x2="28" y2="48" stroke="#00ffeecc" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.6"/>
  <line x1="18" y1="26" x2="38" y2="26" stroke="#00ffee88" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.5"/>
  <!-- Core gem point -->
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="2.5" fill="#00ffee" opacity="0.9"/>
</svg>
The Revenant:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 56 56" width="56" height="56">
  <rect width="56" height="56" rx="2" fill="#020e06"/>
  <!-- Circuit lines behind -->
  <line x1="8" y1="28" x2="18" y2="28" stroke="#44ff8840" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <line x1="38" y1="28" x2="48" y2="28" stroke="#44ff8840" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <line x1="28" y1="8" x2="28" y2="16" stroke="#44ff8840" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <line x1="18" y1="28" x2="18" y2="40" stroke="#44ff8830" stroke-width="0.7"/>
  <line x1="38" y1="28" x2="38" y2="40" stroke="#44ff8830" stroke-width="0.7"/>
  <!-- Skull dome -->
  <path d="M18,30 Q18,14 28,14 Q38,14 38,30 L38,36 L18,36 Z" fill="#44ff8812" stroke="#44ff88" stroke-width="1.3"/>
  <!-- Eye sockets -->
  <ellipse cx="23" cy="27" rx="3.5" ry="3" fill="#020e06" stroke="#44ff88" stroke-width="0.9"/>
  <ellipse cx="33" cy="27" rx="3.5" ry="3" fill="#020e06" stroke="#44ff88" stroke-width="0.9"/>
  <!-- Glowing eyes -->
  <ellipse cx="23" cy="27" rx="1.8" ry="1.6" fill="#44ff88" opacity="0.8"/>
  <ellipse cx="33" cy="27" rx="1.8" ry="1.6" fill="#44ff88" opacity="0.8"/>
  <!-- Jaw -->
  <rect x="19" y="36" width="18" height="7" rx="1" fill="#44ff8808" stroke="#44ff88" stroke-width="1"/>
  <!-- Teeth -->
  <line x1="23" y1="36" x2="23" y2="43" stroke="#44ff8870" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="27" y1="36" x2="27" y2="43" stroke="#44ff8870" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="31" y1="36" x2="31" y2="43" stroke="#44ff8870" stroke-width="1"/>
  <!-- Circuit nodes -->
  <circle cx="18" cy="40" r="1.5" fill="#44ff88" opacity="0.7"/>
  <circle cx="38" cy="40" r="1.5" fill="#44ff88" opacity="0.7"/>
  <circle cx="28" cy="8" r="1.5" fill="#44ff88" opacity="0.5"/>
</svg>
Scrap-Horde:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 56 56" width="56" height="56">
  <rect width="56" height="56" rx="2" fill="#140800"/>
  <!-- Outer jagged ring (hand-drawn teeth) -->
  <polygon points="28,4 31,10 36,7 36,14 42,13 40,19 47,21 43,26 48,30 43,32 46,38 40,38 40,45 34,42 31,48 28,43 25,48 22,42 16,45 16,38 10,38 13,32 8,30 13,26 9,21 16,19 14,13 20,14 20,7 25,10"
    fill="#ff662218" stroke="#ff6622" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <!-- Inner circle -->
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="11" fill="#ff662210" stroke="#ff662280" stroke-width="1"/>
  <!-- Skull-like X -->
  <line x1="22" y1="22" x2="34" y2="34" stroke="#ff6622" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="34" y1="22" x2="22" y2="34" stroke="#ff6622" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <!-- Center rivet -->
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="3" fill="#ff6622" opacity="0.85"/>
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="1.2" fill="#140800"/>
</svg>
Terran League:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 56 56" width="56" height="56">
  <rect width="56" height="56" rx="2" fill="#020c14"/>
  <!-- Shield outline -->
  <path d="M28,6 L48,14 L48,30 Q48,44 28,52 Q8,44 8,30 L8,14 Z" fill="#00b4ff0a" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="1.4"/>
  <!-- Inner shield -->
  <path d="M28,10 L44,17 L44,30 Q44,41 28,48 Q12,41 12,30 L12,17 Z" fill="none" stroke="#00b4ff50" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <!-- Central star -->
  <polygon points="28,17 29.9,23.1 36.4,23.1 31.2,26.9 33.1,33 28,29.2 22.9,33 24.8,26.9 19.6,23.1 26.1,23.1" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.9"/>
  <!-- Two bars below -->
  <rect x="16" y="35" width="24" height="2.8" rx="0.5" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.65"/>
  <rect x="19" y="40" width="18" height="2.2" rx="0.5" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.40"/>
</svg>
Unity Accord:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 56 56" width="56" height="56">
  <rect width="56" height="56" rx="2" fill="#140a00"/>
  <!-- Outer ring (gapped) -->
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="18" fill="none" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-dasharray="9 4"/>
  <!-- Inner ring -->
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="11" fill="#ffaa2208" stroke="#ffaa2280" stroke-width="1"/>
  <!-- Cross hairs -->
  <line x1="28" y1="6" x2="28" y2="17" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="1.4"/>
  <line x1="28" y1="39" x2="28" y2="50" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="1.4"/>
  <line x1="6" y1="28" x2="17" y2="28" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="1.4"/>
  <line x1="39" y1="28" x2="50" y2="28" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="1.4"/>
  <!-- Corner brackets (4×) -->
  <path d="M8,12 L8,8 L12,8" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M48,12 L48,8 L44,8" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M8,44 L8,48 L12,48" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M48,44 L48,48 L44,48" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Center dot -->
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="3.5" fill="#ffaa22" opacity="0.9"/>
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="1.5" fill="#140a00"/>
</svg>
Vorax:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 56 56" width="56" height="56">
  <rect width="56" height="56" rx="2" fill="#14000a"/>
  <!-- Outer membrane (bumpy) -->
  <path d="M28,6 C36,5 44,10 48,18 C52,26 51,36 46,42 C40,50 20,52 12,44 C4,36 4,20 10,12 C16,4 20,7 28,6 Z"
    fill="#ff226614" stroke="#ff2266" stroke-width="1.3"/>
  <!-- Secondary membrane -->
  <path d="M28,12 C34,11 40,15 43,22 C46,29 44,37 39,41 C33,46 19,46 14,40 C9,34 10,22 15,17 C20,12 22,13 28,12 Z"
    fill="#ff226608" stroke="#ff226650" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <!-- Tendrils -->
  <path d="M28,22 Q20,18 14,12" stroke="#ff2266" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <path d="M28,22 Q36,18 44,14" stroke="#ff2266" stroke-width="1.1" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.5"/>
  <path d="M28,34 Q18,38 12,44" stroke="#ff2266" stroke-width="1.1" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.55"/>
  <path d="M28,34 Q38,36 46,42" stroke="#ff2266" stroke-width="1" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.50"/>
  <!-- Nucleus glow -->
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="8" fill="#ff226620" stroke="#ff226680" stroke-width="1"/>
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="5" fill="#ff226630" stroke="#ff2266" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="2.5" fill="#ff2266" opacity="0.9"/>
</svg>
